pageHeader.title: Website Pricing
pageHeader.subtitle: A clear one-time build plus optional ongoing plans — from keeping the lights on to growing traffic and conversions.

hero.subtitle: Transparent pricing for high-performance websites. Choose between a custom build or ongoing growth strategies.

websiteBuild.name: Website Build
websiteBuild.tagline: A complete launch-ready site you own.
websiteBuild.launchNote: Note: Every website includes an initial optimization phase to ensure it launches properly.

ongoingPlans.name: Starter
ongoingPlans.tagline: Keep your site running smoothly and securely.

ongoingPlans.name: Growth
ongoingPlans.tagline: Help customers find you and grow your reach.
features: Tracking setup via Google Analytics and Google Search Console

ongoingPlans.name: Pro
ongoingPlans.tagline: Turn visitors into loyal, paying customers.
features: 1 landing page or major update per month

growthStory.title: Built for effortless growth
growthStory.body: Our process removes the complexity of launching and maintaining a digital presence. We focus on technical excellence so you can focus on your business goals.

image.alt: Modern workspace and digital growth — effortless web presence

items.title: FAST LAUNCH
items.body: Modern stacks and lean handoffs so your site ships on time and stays easy to extend.

items.title: SECURITY FIRST
items.body: SSL, sensible defaults, and maintenance options that keep your site and visitors safer.

items.title: CLEAN CODEBASE
items.body: Readable structure and docs so the next developer — or you — never hits a wall.

addOns.title: Extend the build
addOns.subtitle: Modular add-ons as your site grows — pages, design passes, and commerce.

cards.title: Extra pages
cards.desc: Standard, feature-rich, or dynamic — by complexity.

cards.title: Priority blocks
cards.desc: Reserved time for launches and urgent fixes.

consultCta.title: Need a custom build?
consultCta.body: Tell me what you sell, who you serve, and what's broken today — I'll recommend a simple path and honest pricing.
